arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta's two irreplaceable stars named as contract talks open
arts.sum: Arsenal will look to build on their win over Nottingham Forest when they return to Champions League action on Tuesday against Sporting CP with three points well-needed from the tie

arts.ttl: Arsenal star’s six-word reply makes Martin Odegaard influence clear
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard dazzled in Arsenal's 3-0 win against Nottingham Forest with Mikel Arteta and Riccardo Calafiori both lavish in their praise of the Gunners captain

arts.ttl: Chelsea join Arsenal in £115m Isak chase - Monday's gossip
arts.sum: Chelsea and Arsenal will have to pay £115m to sign Newcastle United's Alexander Isak, Hamburg consider appointing Ruud van Nistelrooy as their new manager, Jose Mourinho dismisses Fenerbahce links to Cristiano Ronaldo, plus more.

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard showed Arsenal exactly what they've been missing with talismanic display in 3-0 win over Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Having spent two months in stuttering form as Martin Odegaard recovered from an ankle injury, the sight of their talismanic captain in top gear on Saturday was a very welcome one

arts.ttl: Ethan Nwaneri earns high praise from Arsenal team-mate amid Mikel Arteta warning
arts.sum: Arsenal's latest academy graduate scored his first league goal against Nottingham Forest and left Riccardo Calafiori to declare he is the most talented 17-year-old the Italian has seen

arts.ttl: Leeds set to rival Liverpool and Arsenal for exciting left-back amid Junior Firpo doubts
arts.sum: Leeds United have identified Nordsjaelland’s Daniel Svensson as a potential new left-back signing amid Junior Firpo’s ongoing contract situation, according to reports. Firpo has been the unquestioned first choice at left-back for Leeds over the past few years and has been in fine form this season, registering three assists in 13 Championship appearances. Leeds set […] The post Leeds set to rival Liverpool and Arsenal for exciting left-back amid Junior Firpo doubts appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland & Viktor Gyokeres made to wait? Barcelona plan big contract call with Robert Lewandowski that would impact future transfer plans
arts.sum: Barcelona are reportedly considering extending Robert Lewandowsk's contract despite being linked with Erling Haaland and Viktor Gyokeres. Barcelona plan big contract call with Robert Lewandowski that would impact future transfer plans

arts.ttl: Real Madrid send clear Arda Guler Arsenal transfer message after Carlo Ancelotti decision
arts.sum: Arsenal have been linked with Real Madrid prodigy Arda Guler in recent weeks but Los Blancos have sent a clear message about his future at the Santiago Bernabeu. However, in the wake of recent speculation Guler has got what he has been searching for in a Real Madrid shirt, his first start since September 21 by Ancelotti.

arts.ttl: Report: 'Amazing' England player wants to sign for Man United over Arsenal; Amorim has green-lit the deal
arts.sum: Manchester United look like they need new signings to get going under Ruben Amorim and it appears the new United boss has already said yes...
